entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "Steve Jobs सोबत महत्त्वाकांक्षेवर वादविवाद करा"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "Greta Thunberg सोबत हवामान धोरणावर वादविवाद करा"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "Batman सोबत न्यायावर वादविवाद करा"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: argument learning साठी inspir वर Debate with a personality वापरण्याचा practical guide, prompts, study loops आणि सुरक्षित AI habits सह.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अधिक मजबूत study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: वादविवाद

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer ऐवजी छोटी पहिली पायरी मागा.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI ला फक्त result नव्हे, तुमचे reasoning check करायला सांगा.

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: personality निवडा.

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: एखाद्या व्यक्तिमत्त्वाशी वादविवाद करा

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Debate With A Personality Using AI हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: real किंवा fictional personality चे नाव द्या आणि कोणत्याही topic वर त्यांच्याशी debate करा. AI debate fair ठेवत त्यांच्या public style आणि worldview ला channel करते.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: debate सह A personality Using AI: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory मधून idea परत लिहून finish करा.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: ज्या विद्यार्थ्यांना संस्मरणीय आवाजांसह आणि निष्पक्ष आव्हानांसह जिवंत वादविवादाचा सराव करायचा आहे.

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: rebuttals practice करा.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Try करण्यासाठी prompts

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: topic set करा.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Debate with a personality वर live mode सुरू करा. neighboring learning format हवा असल्यास Debate any topic try करा. platform च्या broader view साठी AI learning companion सर्वांसाठी काय करायला हवा ते वाचा.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: तुम्ही काय learn किंवा produce करण्याचा प्रयत्न करत आहात ते mode ला सांगा.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: तो difference flow मध्ये दिसतो. one giant response ऐवजी best sessions loop मधून जातात: goal set करा, काहीतरी try करा, feedback मिळवा, weak spot repair करा आणि next action choose करा.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: तो focus महत्त्वाचा आहे. general chatbot जवळजवळ काहीही answer करू शकतो, पण learning mode conversation ला shape देतो. idea stick व्हायला मदत करणाऱ्या thinking, practice, feedback किंवा exploration कडे तो nudge करतो.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: हा वादविवाद त्यांच्या खाजगी विश्वासांचा दावा न करता त्यांच्या सार्वजनिक शैली आणि जागतिक दृष्टिकोनाचा वापर करतो.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: AI सोबत स्वतःला न फसवता study करण्यामागचीही हीच सवय आहे: learner active ठेवा. AI तुमच्या thinking वर feedback देते तेव्हा ते सर्वात उपयोगी ठरते.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: हा mode विशेषतः त्या learners साठी उपयोगी आहे जे करू इच्छितात:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: step तुमच्या स्वतःच्या शब्दांत try करा.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Debate with a personality वापरा जेव्हा तुम्हाला session पटकन सुरू व्हावे पण तरीही ते तुमच्यानुसार adapt व्हावे असे वाटते. पहिले ध्येय प्रभावी वाटणे नाही. पहिले ध्येय पुढचा step शक्य वाटायला लावणे आहे.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: हा mode कशात मदत करतो

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: पुढे कुठे जायचे

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तुमच्या real problem च्या rough version नेही तुम्ही सुरू करू शकता. messy first prompt ठीक आहे. तुम्ही सुरू केल्यावर session level, audience, deadline आणि style स्पष्ट करू शकते.
